mapper.select: /* VM_HR01601_Dao_retrieveUsrList */ SELECT A.empno AS usr_id, A.boncd AS usr_hq_cd, A.buscd AS usr_dept_cd, A.timcd AS usr_sect_cd, A.kwacd AS usr_team_cd, A.zgrcd AS usr_jgrd_cd, B.kostl AS cstct_cd /* 코스트센터 */ FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 A, HRM.vm_hr01a01 B /* 인사부서조직 */ WHERE A.buscd = B.objid /* 조직코드 */ AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN B.strdt AND B.enddt AND A.empno = #{usrEmpno}
